name: vibo-mcp
description: Plan your event music in Vibo (vibodj.com) — browse your events, timeline sections, song requests and playlists, add and like songs, and export to Spotify/Apple Music via natural language.

vibo_email.title: Vibo Email
vibo_email.description: Your Vibo (vibodj.com) account email. Leave blank if you sign in with Apple/Google/Facebook and use a captured access token instead.

vibo_password.title: Vibo Password
vibo_password.description: Your Vibo account password (used for server-side sign-in).

vibo_access_token.title: Vibo Access Token (alternative)
vibo_access_token.description: A captured x-token from a signed-in web.vibodj.com session. Use this instead of email/password if your account only signs in via Apple/Google/Facebook.

vibo_refresh_token.title: Vibo Refresh Token (alternative)
vibo_refresh_token.description: The matching x-refresh-token, so the session can renew when the access token expires.

tools.name: vibo_get_me
tools.description: Get your Vibo profile

tools.name: vibo_healthcheck
tools.description: Verify connectivity and authentication

tools.name: vibo_list_events
tools.description: List your upcoming or past events

tools.name: vibo_get_event
tools.description: Get full details for one event

tools.name: vibo_join_event
tools.description: Join an event via share link or hash

tools.name: vibo_leave_event
tools.description: Leave an event

tools.name: vibo_create_event_contact
tools.description: Add a host/guest contact to an event

tools.name: vibo_list_sections
tools.description: List an event's timeline sections

tools.name: vibo_get_section_songs
tools.description: List the songs requested in a section

tools.name: vibo_search_songs
tools.description: Search for songs to add to a section

tools.name: vibo_add_song_to_section
tools.description: Add a song to a section

tools.name: vibo_toggle_song_like
tools.description: Like or unlike a song

tools.name: vibo_get_playlists
tools.description: List your connected Spotify/Apple Music playlists

tools.name: vibo_get_playlist_songs
tools.description: List tracks in a connected playlist

tools.name: vibo_export_event_to_spotify
tools.description: Export an event's songs to a Spotify playlist

tools.name: vibo_export_event_to_apple_music
tools.description: Export an event's songs to an Apple Music playlist

tools.name: vibo_list_notifications
tools.description: List your Vibo notifications

tools.name: vibo_get_notifications_count
tools.description: Count unread notifications

tools.name: vibo_mark_notifications_read
tools.description: Mark notifications as read

tools.name: vibo_list_section_questions
tools.description: List the DJ's planning questions for a section

tools.name: vibo_answer_question
tools.description: Answer a section planning question (text, options, link, or files)

tools.name: vibo_remove_song_from_section
tools.description: Remove songs from a section

tools.name: vibo_update_song
tools.description: Set must-play / do-not-play / comment on songs

tools.name: vibo_move_song
tools.description: Move songs between sections

tools.name: vibo_reorder_songs
tools.description: Reorder songs within a section

tools.name: vibo_comment_on_song
tools.description: Comment on a song for the DJ

tools.name: vibo_delete_song_comment
tools.description: Delete a song comment

tools.name: vibo_comment_on_section
tools.description: Comment on a timeline section

tools.name: vibo_delete_section_comment
tools.description: Delete a section comment

tools.name: vibo_list_section_song_ideas
tools.description: List the DJ's suggested song-idea collections for a section

tools.name: vibo_list_song_ideas_songs
tools.description: List the suggested songs inside a song-idea collection

tools.name: vibo_import_playlist_to_section
tools.description: Import tracks from a connected playlist into a section

tools.name: vibo_list_event_users
tools.description: List the hosts and guests on an event

tools.name: vibo_invite_users
tools.description: Invite people to an event by email

tools.name: vibo_change_user_role
tools.description: Change a member between host and guest

tools.name: vibo_remove_user
tools.description: Remove a member from an event

tools.name: vibo_update_section
tools.description: Edit a section's name, time, note, or description

tools.name: vibo_set_profile_photo
tools.description: Set your Vibo profile photo from a local image
